title: backend: Reject unsupported Jaeger tracing endpoint
author: harrshita123

findings.description: Commit subject missing SubArea: 'backend: Reject...' should be 'backend: config: Reject...' or 'backend: telemetry: Reject...'
Author rebased cleanly to a single commit — merge-main commits that blocked previous reviews are resolved.
Three new config validation tests + one telemetry-layer test cover all key scenarios: stdout-only, Jaeger-without-stdout rejection, Jaeger-with-stdout (stdout wins), and telemetry-layer rejection.
jaeger-endpoint flag registered with self-documenting description so users get a clear startup error instead of silent OTLP fallback.
